description:
A new batch of user-facing strings has been generated for “ExampleProject 1.0”.  
As the localization engineer you must bring the working tree under  
/home/user/project/ in sync with those changes.

Project layout that already exists when you begin:

/home/user/project/  
└── translations/  
    ├── en.po        – current English reference file  
    └── es.po        – current Spanish translation  
/home/user/patches/  
└── new_strings.patch – a unified-diff produced by the developers  

Goal  
1. Inspect & apply the patch found in /home/user/patches/new_strings.patch.  
   The patch adds one new message to both .po files and revises one existing  
   Spanish translation.  
2. Manually finish the Spanish translation for the new string (provide the text  
   “Adiós”).  
3. Update the PO-Revision-Date header of BOTH .po files to the fixed value  
   exactly (including offset):  
   2023-10-12 12:00+0000  
4. Produce an audit log of your work at  
   /home/user/project/translation_update.log

Required audit-log format (strictly one line per changed file; the automated
tests are case- and whitespace-sensitive):

YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS+0000 | <filename> | added=<N> | updated=<M>

Where  
• <filename> is the bare name of the PO file (e.g. en.po).  
• <N> is the count of brand-new msgid entries introduced by the patch for that
  file.  
• <M> is the count of pre-existing msgid entries whose msgstr was modified.  
• Use the timestamp “2023-10-12 12:00:00+0000” (note the seconds field) on both
  lines.

Verification focus  
• The tests will check that both /home/user/project/translations/en.po and
  /home/user/project/translations/es.po exist and contain the expected headers,
  msgid/msgstr pairs and ordering.  
• The PO-Revision-Date header must match the exact string above.  
• The new Spanish msgstr must be “Adiós”.  
• /home/user/project/translation_update.log must exist and consist of exactly
  two lines with the precise format and values described.

No root privileges are needed. Work entirely within your home directory tree.
truth:
Initial state (before the agent starts)

1. /home/user/project/translations/en.po
--------------------------------------------------
# SOME DESCRIPTIVE TITLE
# Copyright (C)
# This file is distributed under the same license as the project package.
# FIRST AUTHOR <email>, 2023.
#
msgid ""
msgstr ""
"Project-Id-Version: ExampleProject 1.0\n"
"Report-Msgid-Bugs-To: \n"
"POT-Creation-Date: 2023-10-01 10:00+0000\n"
"PO-Revision-Date: 2023-10-01 10:00+0000\n"
"Language: en\n"
"Language-Team: English\n"
"MIME-Version: 1.0\n"
"Content-Type: text/plain; charset=UTF-8\n"
"Content-Transfer-Encoding: 8bit\n"

#: src/ui.c:10
msgid "Hello"
msgstr "Hello"
--------------------------------------------------

2. /home/user/project/translations/es.po
--------------------------------------------------
# SOME DESCRIPTIVE TITLE
# Copyright (C)
# This file is distributed under the same license as the project package.
# FIRST AUTHOR <email>, 2023.
#
msgid ""
msgstr ""
"Project-Id-Version: ExampleProject 1.0\n"
"Report-Msgid-Bugs-To: \n"
"POT-Creation-Date: 2023-10-01 10:00+0000\n"
"PO-Revision-Date: 2023-10-01 10:00+0000\n"
"Language: es\n"
"Language-Team: Spanish\n"
"MIME-Version: 1.0\n"
"Content-Type: text/plain; charset=UTF-8\n"
"Content-Transfer-Encoding: 8bit\n"

#: src/ui.c:10
msgid "Hello"
msgstr "Hola"
--------------------------------------------------

3. /home/user/patches/new_strings.patch
--------------------------------------------------
diff --git a/translations/en.po b/translations/en.po
index e69de29..4b825dc 100644
--- a/translations/en.po
+++ b/translations/en.po
@@
+#: src/ui.c:20
+msgid "Goodbye"
+msgstr "Goodbye"
diff --git a/translations/es.po b/translations/es.po
index e69de29..4b825dc 100644
--- a/translations/es.po
+++ b/translations/es.po
@@
-#: src/ui.c:10
-msgid "Hello"
-msgstr "Hola"
+#: src/ui.c:10
+msgid "Hello"
+msgstr "¡Hola!"
+
+#: src/ui.c:20
+msgid "Goodbye"
+msgstr ""
--------------------------------------------------

Final state that tests will check

1. /home/user/project/translations/en.po
